pages.text: Assemble spells from three types of modules:$(br)- $(l)Carrier$() (required): Determines flight pattern$(br)- $(l)Element$() (required): Determines damage type$(br)- $(l)Effect$() (optional): Adds special behavior$(br)- $(l)Base$() (optional): Boosts power and reduces cooldown$(br2)Taking the output scroll consumes all input materials.

The workbench has 4 input slots and 1 output slot. Place a carrier and element at minimum to produce a scroll. Add an effect module for extra behaviors like explosion or piercing. Add a spell base for increased power.
